true_header: Clause de non divulgation
This agreement is entered into by and between:
Witnesses
Now, therefore, the parties agree as follows:
Each party, to the extent of its right to do so,
The receiving party hereby covenants that,

Be protected and kept in strict confidence by the receiving party which must use the same degree of precaution and safegu ards as it uses to protect its own proprietary information of like importance,
Be only disclosed to and used by those persons who have a need to know and solely for the purpose specified in this agreement,

Not be used in whole or in part for any purpose other than the purpose of this agreement as specified in the preamble and for the project above without the prior written consent of the disclosing party,

Neither be disclosed nor caused to be disclosed whether directly or indirectly to any third party or persons other than t hose mentioned in subparagraph b) or the buyer clients or its co -contractors for the project,
Neither be copied,
Except as aforementioned,
Has come into the public domain prior to,
Is already known to the receiving party,
Has been lawfully received from a third party without restrictions or breach of this agreement,
Has been or is published without violation of this agreement, or
Is independently developed in good faith by an employee or employees of that receiving party who did not have access to t he proprietary information,
Is approved for release or use by written authorization of the disclosing party.
Except as provided under clause 12.2 of the general purchase conditions,
The execution,
This contract shall be governed by buyer country laws and its appropriate courts of paris.

Background
The parties agree as follows:
Definitions
Confidential information
The fact that discussions and negotiations are taking place concerning the purpose and the status of those discussions and negotiations;
The terms of this agreement;
All  confidential  or  proprietary  information  relating  to:
Confidential information does not include information which:
Which  is  or  subsequently  becomes  public  knowledge  or  publicly  available  through  no  fault  of  the receiving party;
Which  is  known  by  the  receiving  party  prior  to  the  time  of  receipt,
Which  is  lawfully  obtained  by  the  receiving  party  from  a  third  party  and  is  not  subject  to  a  similar restriction on disclosure;
Which is independently developed by receiving party; or
The parties agree in writing is not confidential.
Confidentiality obligations
Keep the confidential information secret and confidential,
Not use or exploit the confidential information in any way except for the purpose;
Not disclose or make available any confidential information in whole or in part to any person except as expressly permitted by and in accordance with this agreement;
To establish and maintain adequate security measures to safeguard the confidential information from unauthorized access or use.
Exceptions
Notwithstanding  clause  3.
To its and its affiliate’s representatives,
As may be required by an order of any court of competent jurisdiction or governmental body in which case the receiving party shall,
Return or destruction of confidential information
Upon  the  disclosing  party’s  written  request,
Clause 5.1 of this agreement shall not apply to:
Confidential  information  held  electronically  in  archive  or  back-up  systems  which  are  not  otherwise reasonably retrievable by the representatives of the receiving party or its affiliates;
Copies  of  confidential  information  which  must  be  retained  by  the  receiving  party  pursuant  to applicable law.
Intellectual property
Each party reserves all rights in its confidential information.
No representation
Inadequacy of damages
No obligation to disclose or continue discussions
Term and survival of confidentiality obligations
No partnership or agency

Assignment  and  other  dealings.

Samed 20confidentiality 20non 20disclosure 20and 20conflict 20of 20interest 20agreement 20for 20board 20and 20committee 20members 20ver 201
Confidentiality, non-disclosure and conflict of interest agreement ver 1 adopted by the samed board on: november 2013
Confidentiality policy
Definitions
“agreement” means this confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement
"board" means the board of samed.
“board members” means members of the board.
“chair” means chair of the board.
"committee" means a committee of the board.
"committee members" means members of any committee.
"meeting" means a meeting of the board or a committee, as applicable.
"policy" means this confidentiality policy
“samed” means south african medical devices industry association
“vice-chair”, means vice-chair of the board
The information
Confidentiality
Regular  board  meetings  are,
Members of samed may on invitation attend board meetings.
Once the board has dealt with an issue in a board meeting and has decided on that matter,
All decisions that would be accessible to the general membership and/or the public at large will be recorded as such in the board minutes.
If no recordal is made, the matter,
When considering  whether matters are confidential or not,
The board also holds in-camera meetings,
Committees  are  advisory  to  the  board.
Conflict of interest
Any member of the samed board, executive,
Contract is defined as any written or verbal agreement between two or more parties for the doing or not doing of something specified which is related to the matter at hand.
Transaction is defined as an exchange of money, services, goods, position,
Interest  is  defined  as  any  instance  where  any  contract  or  transaction,
In the event of a conflict of interest, the interested party shall:
Prior to any vote on the issue,
Refrain from voting in relation to the matter.
Withdraw from the meeting when the matter is discussed if requested to do so by a simple majority of the members present and voting at the meeting.
Breaches
In the case of a breach by a board or committee member,
Terms
Additional action
Amendments
No amendment,
Entire agreement
Governing law
Severability

In the event of any one or more of the provisions of this agreement being held for any reason to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable in any respect, such invalidity, illegality or unenforceability  shall  not  affect  any  other  provision  of  this  agreement,  and  this agreement shall be construed as if such invalid, illegal or unenforceable provision was not  a  part  of  this  agreement,  and  the  agreement  shall  be  carried  out  as  nearly  as possible in accordance with its original terms and intent.
